subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, the Sovereign of the Kingdom and the Realm above, the Lord of glory and might, Who hath revealed through the Pen of Destiny [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله مالک الملک و الملکوت و سلطان العز و الجبروت قد اظهر من قلم التقدیر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
